label: Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors

node.label: Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors
node.definition: Typed multidimensional arrays are the common carrier for parameters, activations, observations, and gradients.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors is modeled as depending on Linear algebra, Numerical analysis and feeding downstream nodes such as Images, video & spatial grids, Waveforms, audio & spectrograms, Graphs, hypergraphs & relational data.
examples: atlas downstream link to Images, video & spatial grids
atlas downstream link to Waveforms, audio & spectrograms

limitations: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Linear algebra, Numerical analysis.

dependencies.rationale: Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Linear algebra.
In this atlas graph, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors has a `requires` dependency on Numerical analysis with `core` strength.
